rows.Name: Double Axe
rows.Description: "There's a better use for it than cutting wood."

rows.Name: Bee Missile
rows.Description: "Sweeter than bombs. More destructive than honey."

rows.Name: Ninja Stars
rows.Description: "They won't even know how many I threw."

rows.Name: Gatling
rows.Description: "Sometimes it's good just to spray and pray."

rows.Name: Durian
rows.Description: "Who would have thought something as sharp as thorns would be hidden in that smell?"

rows.Name: Heavy Wheel
rows.Description: "Careful you don't get flattened, too."

rows.Name: Sniper
rows.Description: "Alpha. Bravo. Shh. Tango Down."

rows.Name: Rugby Ball
rows.Description: "That bounced everywhere, destroying everything."

rows.Name: Buzz Saw Blade
rows.Description: "Have you heard of a saw blade that became self-aware?"

rows.Name: Inferno Flask
rows.Description: "Let's see. Where is this mad scientist?"

rows.Name: Elephant Foot
rows.Description: "The true king among the animals. And on your side."

rows.Name: Billiard Ball
rows.Description: "It's round and hard. No, it's not a bowling ball."

rows.Name: Fidget Spinner
rows.Description: "It's possible if you're fast enough."

rows.Name: Moon Flint
rows.Description: "Look! What a cool rock!"

rows.Name: Bunker Buster
rows.Description: "An investigation is needed to determine whether this weapon complies with international law."

rows.Name: Trump Card
rows.Description: "A magician that can cut through steel."

rows.Name: Golden Scissors
rows.Description: "Actually, gold isn't appropriate, but it looks cool, doesn't it?"

rows.Name: Chandelier
rows.Description: "I always thought seeing it fall would be quite the sight."

rows.Name: Monomolecular Blade
rows.Description: "Remember to put the cover back on after using it."

rows.Name: Magic Wand
rows.Description: "Can't you shoot it properly for once?"

rows.Name: Holy Sword
rows.Description: "In the name of justice!"

rows.Name: Snowflake Bomb
rows.Description: "Careful, that's not a child's toy."

rows.Name: P.R.I.S.M.
rows.Description: "Symmetry and reflections. How beautiful."

rows.Name: Mirrorball
rows.Description: "A weapon that blinds you, even when you're not looking at it."

rows.Name: Chain Lightning
rows.Description: "Wearing protective gloves won't help you."

rows.Name: Tornado
rows.Description: "You want to fly? Then get in there."

rows.Name: Volcano
rows.Description: "Now this is a natural disaster."

rows.Name: Nanomachine
rows.Description: "You'll need a very powerful microscope."

rows.Name: UFO
rows.Description: "We've made a deal of sorts."

rows.Name: Meteor Shower
rows.Description: "Let's stop taking pictures and get back to work."

rows.Name: Nova Explosion
rows.Description: "The death of a star is splendid."

rows.Name: Laser Cutter
rows.Description: "Don't worry, we just boosted the output a little bit."

rows.Name: Thunder Hammer
rows.Description: "Even if you find it, you won't be able to lift it."

rows.Name: Black Hole
rows.Description: "If you're lucky, you might come out somewhere."

rows.Name: Portal
rows.Description: "Sometimes I imagine dumping the clutter in my room somewhere else."

rows.Name: Brawl
rows.Description: "It's the ultimate spectacle."

rows.Name: Starlight Journey
rows.Description: "Look at that searing beauty."

rows.Name: Piranha
rows.Description: "Sometimes you need a helping hand."

rows.Name: Umbrella
rows.Description: "We've tweaked our active defense system."

rows.Name: Big Bang
rows.Description: "In the beginning, there was an explosion."

rows.Name: Present Strike
rows.Description: "I'll shower you with gifts."

rows.Name: Multidimensional Egg
rows.Description: "An egg with an unstable dimension is itself a weapon of universal proportions."

rows.Name: Burning Gas Barrel
rows.Description: "That's exactly why safety protocols are important."

rows.Name: God Finger
rows.Description: "Let there be light."

rows.Name: Thor's Hammer
rows.Description: "Good heavens, now they're falling from the sky."

rows.Name: Atomic Molecule
rows.Description: "What a fun science lesson."

rows.Name: Light of Ascension
rows.Description: "Whether for better or worse, it's truly a weapon that makes you 'ascend.'"

rows.Name: Spinning Top
rows.Description: "If you're fast enough, it's possible."

rows.Name: Purifying Flame
rows.Description: "Clean down to the soul."

rows.Name: Starbuster
rows.Description: "It's like watching a star explode."

rows.Name: P.R.I.S.M. -EX-
rows.Description: "How would you like it cut?"

rows.Name: Quantum Machine
rows.Description: "Ever heard the expression 'quantum perfection'?"

rows.Name: Exercise Ball
rows.Description: "Excuse me, that's not how you use the exercise ball!"

rows.Name: Divine Shield
rows.Description: "Who knew shield bashing was actually a real technique."

rows.Name: Sword of Ares
rows.Description: "I came to end this war."

rows.Name: Infernal Chain
rows.Description: "Even your soul shall be bound."

rows.Name: Zeus' Trident
rows.Description: "You'll be lightning-charred in an instant."

rows.Name: God Punch
rows.Description: "Have you committed an unforgivable sin?"

rows.Name: Soul Ninja Stars
rows.Description: "Even the soul shall be split."

rows.Name: Uranium Flask
rows.Description: "A terrifying weapon that melts everything from the inside out."

rows.Name: Odin's Judgment
rows.Description: "Not simply lightning, but divine punishment."

rows.Name: Diamond Scissors
rows.Description: "They aren't just slightly harder than before."

rows.Name: Cherry & Banana
rows.Description: "Sweet juice that goes pop pop!"

rows.Name: Eye of Osiris
rows.Description: "It can see and destroy all."

rows.Name: Sun of Ra
rows.Description: "Have you ever imagined the sun right in front of your eyes?"

rows.Name: Radioactive Rat
rows.Description: "Be careful with rats. You never know what germs they may carry."

rows.Name: Tsunami
rows.Description: "A disaster beyond human comprehension."

rows.Name: Storm Blade
rows.Description: "Wind moving fast enough can become a blade."

rows.Name: Orb of Light
rows.Description: "I shall destroy all with the power of light."

rows.Name: Crispy Chicken
rows.Description: "Everything tastes good when fried. Even a Brick."

rows.Name: Chaos Staff
rows.Description: "I wonder about the mental state of whoever made this weapon."

rows.Name: Party Missile
rows.Description: "I just came to congratulate you."

rows.Name: Dimension Mirror
rows.Description: "Can you find the truth among the countless mirrors?"

rows.Name: Hot Coffee Cup
rows.Description: "A nightmarish day for the staff."

rows.Name: Light of Annihilation
rows.Description: "True annihilation is being erased from memory."

rows.Name: Singular Point
rows.Description: "Even light loses its way there."

rows.Name: Colored Pencil
rows.Description: "A tool that draws the world can also become a tool that erases it."

rows.Name: Dimensional Box
rows.Description: "Have you ever wondered where the missing bricks go?"
